name: Chadric Metal Table Lamp - CTL1089 - Silver/White - Safavieh Couture
description: Illuminate your space with the chadric metal table lamp, a striking blend of silver and white that effortlessly complements any decor. Its sleek metal base combined with a smooth shade creates a modern yet timeless look, perfect for your living room, bedroom, or office. The lamp provides the ideal lighting ambiance to enhance your reading or relaxation time. With its simple yet elegant design, the chadric metal table lamp adds a touch of sophistication to any setting, making it an essential addition to your home. Enjoy its graceful presence and reliable functionality, turning everyday moments into special ones.
